title: May 7
content:
<noinclude>{{Top|real|nocat=1}}
{{Month|May}}

'''May 7''' is the 127th day of the year (128th in leap years). There are 238 days remaining.</noinclude>
*[[1940s|1940]] – [[Wayne Grace]] is born.
*[[1940s#1946|1946]] – [[Sony]] is founded.
*[[1950s#1951|1951]] – [[Rick Veitch]] is born.
*[[1960s#1966|1966]] – [[Robert Townson]] is born.
*[[1960s#1969|1969]] – [[Angel Unzueta]] is born.
*[[1974]] – [[Breckin Meyer]] is born.
*[[1980]] – [[Star Wars Weekly 115|''Star Wars Weekly'' 115]] published.
*[[1996]] – [[Shadows of the Empire 1|''Shadows of the Empire'' 1]] published.
*[[2002]] – [[Star Wars Gamer 10|''Star Wars Gamer'' 10]] published at newsstands.
*[[2003]] – ''[[Star Wars: A Long Time Ago... Volume 6: Wookiee World]]'' published.
*[[2005]] – [[Star Wars—Free Comic Book Day 2005 Special|''Brothers in Arms'']] published as part of [[Free Comic Book Day]].
*[[2008]] – [[Legacy (2006) 23|''Legacy'' (2006) 23]] published.
*[[2009]] – ''[[Sword of the Empire]]'' published.
*[[2010]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Act on Instinct]]'' webcomic concludes.
*[[2011]] – ''[[The Clone Wars: Opress Unleashed]]'' published.
*[[2013]] – ''[[Dawn of the Jedi: Into the Void]]'' published.
*[[2014]] – ''[[Star Wars Omnibus: Dark Times Volume 2]]'' published.
*[[2019]] – [[Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle (TPB)|''Star Wars Adventures: Tales from Vader's Castle'' trade paperback]] published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Meet the Heroes: R2-D2]]'' published.
*2019 – ''[[Star Wars: Meet the Villains: Darth Vader]]'' published.
*[[2021]] – "[[Cut and Run]]" airs on [[Disney+]].
*[[2024]] – [[Star Wars: The Mandalorian Vol. 2 (manga)|''Star Wars: The Mandalorian Vol.'' 2]] published in the United States.
*2024 – [[Star Wars: Visions (TPB)|''Star Wars: Visions'' trade paperback]] published in the United States.
*2024 – [[Star Wars: The Return of The Jedi 40th Anniversary Special Edition]] published.
*[[2025]] – [[Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch: Ghost Agents 3|''Hyperspace Stories: The Bad Batch: Ghost Agents'' 3]] published.
*2025 – [[Star Wars (2025) 1|''Star Wars'' (2025) 1]] published.
<noinclude>
